title: Section 50
content: No person shall have any right, whether in contract or otherwise, to any compensation for any loss incurred by reason of the operation of any of the provisions 1[contained in sections 10, 12A, 16, 35A, 35B, 2[36, 43A and 45] or by reason of the compliance by a banking company with any order or direction given to it under this Act].
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 95 of 1956, s. 12, for certain words (w.e.f. 14-1-1957). 2. Subs. by Act 37 of 1960, s. 8, for "and 36" (w.e.f. 19-9-1960)
